---
title: "Notebook: A Simple Confidence Interval"
lang: en
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: lualatex
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

A small placeholder: the normal approximation for a binomial proportion.

## Wald interval

```{python}
import math
import pandas as pd

n = 120
k = 58
p_hat = k / n
sigma = math.sqrt(p_hat * (1 - p_hat) / n)
lo = p_hat - 1.96 * sigma
hi = p_hat + 1.96 * sigma

pd.DataFrame({
    "quantity": ["p_hat", "lower bound", "upper bound"],
    "value": [p_hat, lo, hi],
})
```
